notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.4. It addresses 15 CVEs: CVE-2023-52482, CVE-2025-38500, CVE-2025-38352, CVE-2025-37797, CVE-2025-38079, and 10 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
